handoff.reason: Roadmap Phase 4 rolling program with Primary-Sources validation target (operator directive 2026-06-13)

execution_rules.notes: Rolling: P1 planned; P2-P3 deferred with unapproved hard stops. Integrator lane.

hard_constraints: Same modules that write .coderef artifacts; compact JSON; resolved-edges-only; <=5 ambiguity candidates
Integrator lane: commit to main + push per phase

decisions_log.note: Operator: target Primary-Sources (CODEREF/PROJECTS/primary-sources). P2 validates the full toolset there: repopulate with new core, diff report, register .mcp.json, live smoke.

plan_adjustments.summary: P1 shipped: hotspots (fan-in/out, src_only default true honoring evidence.testOrigin), cycles (iterative Tarjan SCC), what_exports (export edges + ambiguity envelope) + impact_of export-edge hygiene fix (BFS now call+import only - a file export edge no longer makes the file a dependent of its own element). 24/24 MCP tests (8 new); suite 1632 passing (single documented contention flake). Live stdio smoke: 9 tools listed; hotspots top = demo-all-modules#main (fan_out 92); cycles found a REAL 2-element cycle in coderef-core's graph; what_exports(call-resolver) = 13 exports matching the restamped header exactly.

P2 shipped: diff_impact (git diff -U0 -> index line-range element mapping -> union reverse-BFS) + rag_search (provider/store from rag-index.json metadata; graceful rag_index_missing/embedding_unavailable envelopes). PS VALIDATION (operator directive): repopulated PS with new core (398 files, 19.9s) - 14-field report, builtin 107->665 at PS scale, src-only counts coherent (97% src - opposite noise profile from coderef-core, validating the testOrigin tag both ways); edge-count delta vs May baseline attributed to repo churn (896 commits since) NOT core regression; .mcp.json registered for PS; all 11 tools live-smoked against PS (diff_impact HEAD~5: 3 files -> 22 elements -> 8 dependents; cycles: 0 = clean architecture; rag_search: 3 results via ollama). Lesson: MCP smoke clients must sequence the initialize handshake before tools/call - async handlers expose the race. Suite 1635 passing, ZERO failures - first fully green full run of the session (even the contention flake passed).

P3 shipped: coderef-intelligence-server retired (ruling A). Consumer sweep found ZERO callers (LLOYD, ASSISTANT SKILLS/SURFACES, DASHBOARD); only a bin entry, its own source, one doc, and a comment in output-validator referenced it. Source + bin deleted; docs/intelligence-api.md replaced with tombstone + endpoint->MCP replacement map; output-validator comment cleaned. Build green; suite 1634 passing (single failure = the documented scanner-export contention flake, which PASSED in the immediately prior run - textbook non-determinism).

communication_log.message: WO created from STUB-ASC73J (roadmap PHASE-4). Rolling: P1 graph tools (6 tasks); P2 flow tools + PS validation (STUB-XF1EX0); P3 intel-server retirement (STUB-9F63EJ, ruling A).
Phase 1 COMPLETE pending commit. Continuing to Phase 2 (flow tools + Primary-Sources validation) per operator standing approval + PS-target directive.
Phase 2 COMPLETE pending commit. Continuing to Phase 3 (intelligence-server retirement, ruling A) - hotspots replacement now shipped, sequencing satisfied.
Phase 3 COMPLETE - final phase (close_after_phase=3). Full close-out next.
